overall.description: A cinematic third-person perspective from a dark fantasy video game (Elden Ring) showing a cloaked character walking slowly through tall grass toward the massive glowing Erdtree and distant stone castle fortifications under a cloudy, misty night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty grassland with glowing tree landmark and stone fortification

leafless twisted tree with gnarled branches silhouetted against sky

wooden construction structures near the castle walls
red cloth banners hanging from poles near the fortification

segments.scene_description: The character walks slowly through a misty grassland at night, approaching the massive glowing Erdtree that dominates the horizon. To the right, a stone castle with wooden scaffolding and red banners stands against the cloudy sky, while a bare twisted tree frames the left side of the view. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with cool blue tones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty nocturnal grassland that draws closer to a colossal, glowing landmark. It begins with a cloaked character walking slowly through cool blue tones, framed by a bare, twisted tree on the left. As the character advances, the view expands to reveal a stone castle to the right, complete with wooden scaffolding and red banners fluttering against a cloudy sky. The scene then shifts its focus toward the horizon, where the massive, luminous Erdtree increasingly dominates the dark and atmospheric landscape.
